zh.lifeSummary: Alice Lloyd於大約1574年出生在英國。她於大約1588年與Rev. John Howse在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1640年6月享年67歲，埋葬在英國肯特易亞斯特維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Lloyd于大约1574年出生在英国。她于大约1588年与Rev. John Howse在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1640年6月享年67岁，埋葬在英国肯特易亞斯特維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lloyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: descriptive nickname from Welsh llwyd ‘gray’. InWelsh the color term llwyd also includes shades of brown, andit is likely that, when used with reference to younger men,llwyd denoted brown or mouse-colored hair.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Alice Lloyd was born about 1574, in England. She married Rev. John Howse about 1588, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in June 1640, at the age of 67, and was buried in Eastwell, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Lloyd est née environ 1574, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Rev. John Howse environ 1588, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en juin 1640, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Eastwell, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Alice Lloyd wurde um 1574 in England geboren. Sie hat um 1588 in England Rev. John Howse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb im Juni 1640 im Alter von 67 Jahren und wurde in Eastwell, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alice Lloyd è nata il circa 1574 nel England. Lei sposato Rev. John Howse circa 1588, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1640, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Eastwell, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Lloydは約1574年にイギリスで生まれた。約1588年にイギリスでRev. John Howseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1640年6月に67歳で死去し，イギリスケントエアストウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Lloyd(은)는 대략 1574년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1588년 영국에서 Rev. John Howse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1640년 6월 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 이스트웰에 묻혔다.

mn.Eastwell, Kent, England, United Kingdom: Eastwell, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Alice Lloyd nasceu aproximadamente 1574, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Rev. John Howse aproximadamente 1588, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em junho de 1640, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Lloyd родилась около 1574 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rev. John Howse около 1588 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла июнь 1640 г. в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности эаствелл, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Alice Lloyd nació aproximadamente 1574, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Rev. John Howse aproximadamente 1588, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en junio de 1640, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra.
